metadata.title: Bulk Row Label Generator for Excel - Labels, IDs, CSV Preview
metadata.description: Generate bulk row labels for Excel, CSV exports, operations lists, IDs, tickets, batches, and reports with formulas and previews.

hero.title: Bulk row label generator for Excel
hero.description: Create labels for rows, batches, exports, tickets, SKUs, accounts, and reports without manually writing or dragging them.

announcement.title: For operations lists, imports, reports, and CSV prep

intent.title: One generator for many label patterns
intent.description: Bulk labels are the same pattern with different words: prefix, number, step, separator, and optional padding.

items.title: Operations labels
items.description: Batch1, Batch2, Ticket100, Ticket101, or any internal list label.

items.title: CSV-ready previews
items.description: Preview and copy a small fixed-value sample when another app needs CSV-like input.

items.title: Formula-first workflow
items.description: Use formulas for long Excel ranges instead of generating huge browser output.

workflow.title: Build a row label sequence
workflow.description: Start with a label pattern, then choose whether formula or preview values fit the job.

items.title: Pick the label prefix
items.description: Use names like Row, Batch, Ticket, SKU, Account, or Client.

items.title: Set the numbering rule
items.description: Choose start number, count, step, separator, and padding.

items.title: Copy the best output
items.description: Use formula output for Excel ranges or preview output for fixed sample values.

related.title: Related label and formula pages
related.description: Each page targets a distinct spreadsheet search intent.

items.title: Account label generator
items.description: For Account1 and account ID sequences.

items.title: Sequence formula generator
items.description: For SEQUENCE, ROW, and TEXT formula patterns.

items.title: Autofill without dragging
items.description: For users trying to fill long series faster.

items.question: What labels can I generate?
items.answer: Any prefix plus number pattern, such as Row1, Batch-0100, Ticket500, or SKU-0001.

items.question: Can this make CSV output?
items.answer: Yes. The generator includes a CSV preview for copy-ready fixed values.

items.question: Should I copy values or formulas?
items.answer: Use formulas for large Excel ranges and values for small fixed previews or imports.

cta.title: Create bulk row labels now
cta.description: Open the generator and copy the output that fits your spreadsheet task.
